content: Codex now allows users to reset usage limits by inviting friends. Inviting a new account that sends a few messages triggers a reset for both weekly limits and five-hour restrictions via email. Limitations apply: three invitations maximum per month; invitees must not have used Codex in 62 days; all plan types qualify. Verification codes are required when invited users log in.

title: Science 报道耿同学打假，称其为打击学术不端「出人意料的盟友」，如何看待这一说法？
content: Chinese journal *Science* reports that former doctoral student Geng Hongwei has become an "unexpected ally" in fighting academic misconduct. Since April, the independent video blogger has exposed problematic papers by top Chinese scientists, including image duplication and suspicious data. Nine papers published in Springer Nature journals are under investigation, leading to dismissals of senior scholars. Officials' swift response and extensive media coverage suggest unusual tolerance or even recognition of such grassroots whistleblowing through social media. Geng focuses on prominent scholars with substantial research resources, examining publicly available raw data and online leads.

title: AI, Growth, and the Future of Healthcare | Anish Acharya & Sachin Jain
content: Anish Acharya and Sachin Jain discuss AI's transformative impact on healthcare and enterprise operations. Acharya argues AI is fundamentally different from productivity tools—it can perform work autonomously. They examine AI adoption in large organizations, its effects on customer support, software development, and healthcare operations. Key traits for successful adaptation include curiosity, experimentation, and ambition. The conversation also addresses AI's potential to reduce healthcare costs, improve patient experiences, and drive economic growth and human flourishing.

title: Siri 的 Prompt 泄露，大概 20k tokens
content: Apple's Siri system prompt was leaked through a feedback error report in iOS 27 beta, containing approximately 20,000 tokens. The prompt instructs Siri to generate visually rich responses with imagery, native app UI, structured comparisons, and sourced citations. It directs Siri to think before acting, search when needed, accept user corrections, reject factual errors, be honest about limitations, refuse instruction redefinition through conversation, maintain consistent voice regardless of user tone, and clarify its nature as software without emotions, body, gender, nationality, or personal history.

title: 独家｜字节 AI 制药开启拆分融资，AI4S 进入产业化阶段
content: ByteDance is spinning off its AI drug discovery unit into a separately funded company, which it will still control. The team, led by Liu Kai since 2021 and comprising about 50 AI and pharmaceutical specialists, will take its algorithms, platforms, and drug pipeline—including the Anew Labs platform and early-stage assets like IL-17 inhibitors—into the new entity. The move aims to create an organizational structure better suited to biotech's longer development cycles and talent needs, marking ByteDance's first push to commercialize its AI for science (AI4S) research.

title: 一个人写了大半年 Android App，聊聊过程中的一些取舍，第 6
content: Meows is a native Android SSH server monitoring app built with Jetpack Compose. It tracks VPS metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network) via standard SSH without requiring server-side installation. Key features include real-time monitoring with historical graphs, alerts, an interactive terminal with custom ANSI engine, Docker container management, network diagnostic tools, streaming service unlock detection, and encrypted Google Drive backups. Security focuses on AES-GCM + Android Keystore encryption for credentials, minimal permissions, and a privacy mode blocking screenshots. Priced at $4.99 one-time, no subscription. Requires Android 14+. Available in select regions on Google Play. No iOS version planned.

title: codex win app+proxifier 配置踩坑
content: A user configured the Windows Codex app with Proxifier instead of system proxy or Clash TUN mode (to avoid WSL2 network issues). Initial attempts failed: direct Proxifier rules caused loading hangs, while .env proxy variables broke local services and mobile app pairing. The root cause was that Codex's UI-to-backend and mobile pairing traffic use localhost, which became broken when forced through the proxy. The fix: add a top-priority Proxifier rule forcing localhost/127.0.0.1 traffic to Direct for codex/Codex.exe, while keeping external traffic on Proxy.

title: 万人内测，科研神器爆火实验室，4h肝出论文初稿，全自动接管科研
content: Mira is an AI-powered research platform developed by Deep Principle, evolving from the SciClaw beta tested by 10,000 researchers. It features three core tools: Agent Squad for customizable AI team configurations without fixed workflows, an infinite Research Canvas for organizing and comparing multi-format files, and an automated WIKI that structures daily research interactions into a project knowledge base. The platform embodies "Vibe Researching," where researchers direct exploration while AI handles execution, documentation, and knowledge retention. Mira is now publicly available at sciclaw.cn.

title: 哈萨比斯最新震撼预言：留给旧世界的时间，不到2000天
content: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis predicts AGI will arrive around 2030, with humanity at "the foot of the singularity." He warns AI's impact will be tenfold the Industrial Revolution's, compressed into one-tenth the time—leaving only 2–3 years to adapt. Despite AI's optimization power, Hassabis emphasizes human agency: the unique value lies in choosing what to do, not how. Key mistakes to avoid: treating cost-cutting as strategy, outsourcing core judgment, and waiting for clarity. Recommended actions: audit which tasks AGI will replace, identify internal AI adopters, run real experiments, and gain firsthand exposure to AI in action.

title: 三大运营商被质疑杀熟，网友称 159 元套餐不如 39 元，新老用户不同权根源在哪？用户该如何维权？
content: Chinese telecom operators are facing widespread complaints of price discrimination against long-term customers. Multiple users report that cheaper, high-value data plans are reserved for new customers or those upgrading from minimal plans, while loyal subscribers remain stuck on expensive legacy packages. Customers often only secure better deals after threatening to switch carriers or file regulatory complaints. The practice affects all three major operators—China Mobile, China Telecom, and China Unicom—prompting social media campaigns against "customer exploitation" and demands for pricing transparency.

title: 永久免费，美团AI浏览器来了，10多个顶级模型帮你干活，还附送Agent外挂
content: Meituan's GN06 team launched Tabbit V1.0, an AI browser integrating traditional browsing with large-model Q&A, search, and Agent capabilities. The core features remain permanently free. It supports 10+ top Chinese AI models with multi-model parallel responses, executes complex tasks like generating documents and operating webpages, and offers 300+ reusable Agent skills. Key upgrades include 70% task success rate for web operations, long-term memory adapting to user habits, cloud-based execution for security, and minimalist UI design. Mobile beta versions for iOS and Android are available.

title: Claude深夜炸场，放出史上最强“危险级”模型Fable 5，价格逆天
content: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, its most powerful public model derived from the restricted Mythos-class system previously deemed too risky for broad access due to advanced cybersecurity capabilities. Fable 5 tops benchmarks in software engineering (SWE-Bench Pro: 80.3%), autonomous coding (FrontierCode Diamond: 29.3%), and exploit detection (78.0%), but commands premium pricing at $10/$50 per million input/output tokens—far above competitors like DeepSeek. The model includes safety classifiers that may refuse or downgrade sensitive queries, positioning it as a luxury tool for high-value enterprise tasks rather than mass-market deployment.

title: 刚刚，Claude Mythos 5发布，5000万行代码1天搞定
content: Anthropic released two flagship models: Claude Fable 5, a safeguarded version available to all users, and Claude Mythos 5, a full-capability version restricted to trusted users with reduced safety limits in cybersecurity and biological research. Fable 5 features automatic downgrade routing to Claude Opus 4.8 for flagged high-risk queries covering cybersecurity, bio/chemical risks, and model distillation. Key capabilities include 80.3% on SWE-bench Pro, completing a 50 million-line code migration in one day, native visual gameplay of Pokémon without scaffolding, and million-token context retention. Pricing is $10 per million input tokens and $50 per million output tokens—over 50% reduction from preview rates. Notably, Anthropic requires 30-day data retention for Mythos-tier models for security monitoring. title: SemiAnalysis：CPO落地预期延后
content: SemiAnalysis delays CPO adoption forecasts: scale-up CPO (GPU-side) now expected 2029, not 2027–2028, with scale-out CPO (switch-side) shipments also cut for 2026–2027. System integration and yield pose critical bottlenecks—32 COUPEs per switch yield only ~19% system yield at 95% component yield, requiring 99.5% for viable 85% system yield. Copper interconnect and pluggable optics (NPO) maintain dominance; NPO demand surges as practical alternative. Upgrades: Amphenol, Vertiv. Downgrades: Lumentum, Himax, Wolfspeed.

title: Anthropic 明天或将发布公开版本 Mythos
content: Anthropic is expected to release a public version of its powerful AI model Mythos, possibly named "Claude Fable 5." The version will include stronger safety guardrails and reduced access to sensitive dual-use capabilities like cybersecurity compared to the earlier Project Glasswing. It represents Anthropic's first offering of Mythos-level capabilities to the general public. The company has not officially confirmed the release.

title: 欧盟回应苹果 Siri AI 争议：法律不可谈判，苹果未能达到互操作性要求

The EU rejected Apple's requested 18-month exemption, emphasizing EU law is non-negotiable and gatekeepers cannot close markets. Apple had cited security concerns regarding third-party AI system access to user devices.

title: 阿里巴巴、百度、蔚来回应「被美国防部列入中国军工企业名单」
content: Alibaba, Baidu, and NIO responded to their inclusion on the U.S. Defense Department's list of Chinese military companies on June 9. All three stated the designation lacks basis, as they are not military enterprises and do not participate in military-civil fusion activities. They will pursue legal action to protect their rights. The companies noted the list only restricts U.S. Defense Department procurement and does not affect normal business operations, impose export controls, or limit securities trading.

title: Beyond Prompting: Context Engineering and Memory Management for AI Systems at Scale
From one-off prompts to workflows: How to use custom agents in GitHub Copilot CLI
content: Custom agents in GitHub Copilot CLI let developers encode team-specific workflows into reusable, versioned Markdown profiles stored in `.github/agents`. These specialized agents apply consistent standards, tools, and outputs across tasks like security audits, infrastructure compliance, release documentation, and incident response. Unlike off-the-shelf partner agents that offer quick starts with tool-specific expertise, custom agents enforce internal conventions, integrate proprietary tooling, and reduce repetitive "glue work." Profiles are reviewable, shareable, and maintain continuity between CLI, IDE, and GitHub.
